hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.tsx$|\.ts$"; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); D=0; while [ "$DIR" != "/" ] && [ $D -lt 6 ]; do if [ -f "$DIR/tsconfig.json" ] && [ -f "$DIR/package.json" ]; then cd "$DIR" && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | head -20; exit 0; fi; DIR=$(dirname "$DIR"); D=$((D+1)); done; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.tsx$|\.ts$"; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); D=0; while [ "$DIR" != "/" ] && [ $D -lt 6 ]; do if [ -f "$DIR/eslint.config.mjs" ]; then cd "$DIR" && npx eslint "$FILE" --max-warnings=5 2>&1 | tail -15; exit 0; fi; DIR=$(dirname "$DIR"); D=$((D+1)); done; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH:-}"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.env$|\.env\.local$|\.env\.production$|\.env\.staging$|\.env\.development$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Writing to $FILE is not allowed. Use .env.example for templates only. Real env values must be set manually in your shell or hosting platform."; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
